event: Concept validation, branding, and early partnership development for Project AETHER
Requirements, CONOPS, system ICD, live crowdfund stack, P0 partner outreach (accelerated Phase A/B start)
PDR-lite, materials & balloon prototype tests, sensor/comms baselining, facility access
CDR-lite, flight hardware fab, payload integration, 50% funding milestone
Environmental qual, system I&T, inflation sequence test, launch LOI / rideshare path
Flight software freeze, ops rehearsals, ship prep, funding closeout
Launch campaign + Venus transfer injection (target window ~2027-12-15)
Cruise → Venus entry → balloon float ops (30–90 days) + first public data release
Phase II: larger aerostats → habitation tech path (post-flight lessons)
Agency background: NASA aerobot / ESA concepts for 48–60 km variable balloons
